title: Adelphi Laboratory Center
description: All security clearances must be faxed to the DEVCOM Army Research Laboratory Visitor’s Desk at 301-394-2087.
text:
All security clearances must be faxed to the DEVCOM Army Research Laboratory Visitor’s Desk at 301-394-2087.
Non-U.S. citizens representing a foreign government, industry, or academic institution must do the following:
Submit a visit request to the Foreign Disclosure Officer at
301-394-4977, or fax at 301-394-4583
Submit this request via the correct official diplomatic channels prior to the visit
U.S. Citizens representing industry or academic institution must contact their ARL point of contact at least 48 hours prior to arrival.
